name: Booking Site
description: A site for a service that takes bookings (barber, salon, studio): hero, services with prices, a how-it-works section, and a working booking-request form wired to the data API.
prompt: Build a site for a <service> that takes bookings: a nav, a hero, a services section listing each service with its price in the description, a three-step 'how booking works' section, and a working booking-request form (name, email, preferred date) that POSTs to the bookings collection and confirms on success, plus a footer.
